tool_args.label: Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio YTD October 2024 (KPI)
Standard Cost per Passenger YTD October 2024
Monthly Farebox Operating Ratio Standard October 2024
Monthly Cost per Passenger Standard October 2024
Revenue variance cause

payload.claim_text: Total revenue of $767.0 million was $22.0 million lower than the Mid-Year Forecast. This unfavorable variance was due to lower capital reimbursements partially offset by higher non-commutation ridership.

tool_args.label: Farebox Revenue favorable variance driver

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenues were $25.1 million favorable to the Forecast due to an increase in non-commutation ridership across all East of Hudson lines.

tool_args.label: Claims expense driver Valhalla incident

payload.claim_text: Claims were $5.0 million unfavorable to the Forecast due to an increase in the passenger claim provision for the Valhalla incident.

tool_args.label: Professional Service Contracts variance due to mobile app support

payload.claim_text: Professional Service Contracts were $6.1 million unfavorable to the Forecast due to the recognition of the entire annual cost for mobile ticket application support consistent with GASB96 policies as well as a catch-up for prior years' New Haven Line MTA IT allocation costs.

tool_args.label: Ridership increase driven by non-commutation ridership East of Hudson

payload.claim_text: Metro-North farebox revenue totaled $59.3 million which was 6.4 million or 12.1% above the Forecast. The variances below are driven by an increase in non-commutation ridership all East of Hudson lines.

tool_args.label: Steven Weiss as Financial Liaison for Metro-North
Preliminary close - subject to change

payload.gap_text: Figures are based on the preliminary close of the period. Labor and are subject to change during the period. Please note that the current month's actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
payload.description: October 2024 actuals are preliminary and do not include post-close adjustments
